description: Comprehensive registry of 145 free MCP servers across 15 categories — the data backbone for the MCP Stack Curator feature. Now includes ModelScope (魔搭) curated servers with free hosted deployment. Each entry includes protocol, tags, stack compatibility, and conflict data for automated stack recommendation.
